Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​Boolean>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​Boolean>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BooleanVerifierImpl, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>
extends AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​Boolean>
implements ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>
An implementation of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier.
